# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring


{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "appServicePlanName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('plan-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, 'AppServicePlan'))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the App Service plan to create."
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('server-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, 'SqlServer'))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the SQL Server to create."
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('database-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, 'SqlDatabase'))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the SQL Database to create."
      }
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('storage', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, 'StorageAccount'))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Storage Account to create."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The location in which to deploy the resources."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "appServicePlanId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
    "sqlServerId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
    "sqlDatabaseId": "[concat(variables('sqlServerId'), '/databases/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
    "storageAccountId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "tier": "Standard",
        "size": "S1",
        "family": "S",
        "capacity": 1
      },
      "kind": "linux",
      "properties": {
        "perSiteScaling": false,
        "reserved": true,
        "targetWorkerCount": 0,
        "targetWorkerSizeId": 0
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2018-06-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "S0",
        "tier": "Standard"
      },
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[concat(resourceGroup().id, 'Admin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlServerAdminPassword')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2018-06-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "S0",
        "tier": "Standard"
      },
      "kind": "v12.0,user",
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "edition": "Standard",
        "maxSizeBytes": 524288000,
        "requestedServiceObjectiveName": "S0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS",
        "tier": "Standard"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "encryption": {
          "services": {
            "blob": {
              "enabled": true
            },
            "file": {
              "enabled": true
            }
          },
          "keySource": "Microsoft.Storage"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "functionapp",
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[variables('appServicePlanId')]",
        "siteConfig": {
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_DNS_SERVER",
              "value": "168.63.129.16"
            },
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_VNET_ROUTE_ALL",
              "value": "1"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/virtualNetworkConnections",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('appServicePlanName'), '/', parameters('vnetName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "vnetResourceId": "[variables('virtualNetworkId')]",
        "certThumbprint": null,
        "certBlob": null,
        "routes": {
          "private": [
            {
              "name": "default",
              "properties": {
                "addressPrefix": "10.0.0.0/24",
                "nextHopType": "VirtualNetworkGateway"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "resyncRequired": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/virtualNetworkConnections/gateways",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('appServicePlanName'), '/', parameters('vnetName'), '/default')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "gatewayId": "[variables('virtualNetworkGatewayId')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/virtualNetworkConnections/routes",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('appServicePlanName'), '/', parameters('vnetName'), '/default')]",

        "routes": [
          {
            "name": "default",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.0.0/24",
              "nextHopType": "VirtualNetworkGateway"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/virtualNetworkConnections/routes",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('appServicePlanName'), '/', parameters('vnetName'), '/default')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "routes": [
          {
            "name": "default",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.0.0/24",
              "nextHopType": "VirtualNetworkGateway"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/virtualNetworkConnections/routes",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('appServicePlanName'), '/', parameters('vnetName'), '/default')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",

              "nextHopType": "VirtualNetworkGateway"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
